description: A non-profit needs to submit its semi-annual progress report for a federal grant.

nodes.task_description: Identify the non-profit and the specific grant.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the correct grant file.

nodes.task_description: Guide the user in completing the progress report form, including financial and performance metrics.

expected_outcome.value: Agent helps the user fill out all required sections of the report.

nodes.task_description: Accept the submission of the progress report.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully logs the report as submitted on time.
